description: Measure what changed after learning over time, including transfer, retention, and barriers to sustained use.

examples: We want to know what changed after participants completed the training a few weeks later.
Help me measure whether our program led to durable behavior change.

nodes.label: Change since learning
nodes.description: Surface what participants say is meaningfully different after the program.

nodes.label: Behavioral transfer
nodes.description: Capture concrete examples of learners applying the learning in their real context.

nodes.label: Retention and decay
nodes.description: Identify what stuck, what faded, and why.

nodes.label: Contextual barriers
nodes.description: Understand environmental constraints that blocked application.

nodes.label: Support ecosystem
nodes.description: Assess how managers, peers, or systems reinforced or undermined learning use.
